pros: AI bidding across UA, CTV and retargeting
Part of Entravision gives enterprise backing

review.verdict: Respectable mid-tier DSP crossing mobile and CTV, but not the scale leader in either.
review.best_for: Mid-market advertisers running combined mobile and CTV performance campaigns.
review.not_for: Brands needing maximum scale or top-of-market CTV measurement sophistication.
